testName: verifying that when a valid login is performed
description: A user with valid credentials should be able to log in and access the dashboard. This test ensures the login mechanism works for legitimate users.
steps: 1. Open login page. 2. Enter valid username and password. 3. Click login.
impact: Critical for user access and security.

testName: verifying that when an invalid password is entered
expected: Error message shown, stays on login page
description: Ensures that users cannot log in with an incorrect password, protecting against unauthorized access.
steps: 1. Open login page. 2. Enter valid username and wrong password. 3. Click login.
